properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origin
properties.description: Allowed CORS origin for the frontend (e.g. http://localhost:5173). Set via CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN env var.

properties.name: security.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens. Set via QAMS_JWT_SECRET env var.

properties.name: security.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token lifetime in milliseconds. Default 86400000 (24 h). Set via QAMS_JWT_EXPIRATION_MS env var.
